properties.title: Brenner Pass
properties.summary: Major Alpine corridor used during postwar movement into Italy.
properties.context: After 1945, large refugee flows moved through this pass. Administrative breakdown allowed mixed populations to travel south.

properties.title: Rome Node
properties.context: Certain networks in Rome assisted displaced persons with travel papers during the late 1940s.

properties.title: Port of Genoa
properties.context: Ships departing here carried migrants and others to destinations in South America after the war.
